hypotheses.name: LR classifier: TF vs target-only from SV5-7 L0 coords
hypotheses.method: LogisticRegression (C=1.0, StandardScaler) on 3D SV5-7 coordinates at L0. 5-fold stratified CV. TF genes (n=68, appear as source in TRRUST pos edges) vs target-only genes (n=215, target but never source). 100-permutation null. Controls: SV2-4 at L0, SV5-7 at L8.
hypotheses.next_action: Test across seeds (cycle4_immune_seed43/44) for cross-seed replication. Also test with more SV axes (full SV1-7) to check if additional axes improve AUROC.

hypotheses.name: BFS hierarchy depth vs SV5-7 dominant axis (L0)
hypotheses.method: Build directed graph from 589 positive TRRUST pairs (nonzero genes). BFS from 33 master TFs (in-degree=0). Spearman correlation: BFS depth vs SV5-7 coordinates at L0 and L8. n=283 nodes with assigned depth (depth 0-3).
hypotheses.next_action: Use partial Spearman controlling for TF/target role to isolate depth effect. Also test on larger graph if more TRRUST pairs available.

hypotheses.name: Layer-resolved TF->target directionality trajectory (all 12 layers, SV5-7)
hypotheses.method: At each of 12 layers: SVD of centered nonzero embeddings [2039,512], project to SV5-7. For 589 positive pairs, compute displacement vector (target - source). Combined magnitude of mean displacement and Cohen's d per axis. No null needed (t-test against 0).
hypotheses.result_value: L0=0.00568 -> L9=0.01997 (3.5x increase); peak at L9; all 12 layers p<0.05 on at least one axis
hypotheses.next_action: Cross-seed replication of trajectory (seed43/44). Test if L9 peak corresponds to specific biological function (L9 = 10th transformer block). Also compute SV2-4 directionality trajectory as comparative control.
